requirements.criterion: 进入 Obligation 管理页面后展示左侧列表、筛选和右侧详情面板
tests: frontend/e2e/obligation-management.spec.ts :: 管理员可以查看条文详情并管理控制点映射

auth_authz_coverage: admin-only page gating in component implementation
error_path_coverage: list/detail empty state and forbidden state rendered by page implementation

requirements.criterion: 管理员可以新建和编辑 obligation，并使用 clause 搜索与 code suggestion
tests: frontend/lib/api/obligations.test.ts :: creates and updates an obligation
frontend/lib/api/obligations.test.ts :: suggests a stable obligation code from clause context and existing codes
frontend/app/admin/obligations/page.test.tsx :: opens create dialog, searches clauses, and creates an obligation with suggested code
frontend/e2e/obligation-management.spec.ts :: 管理员可以搜索条文并新建义务

error_path_coverage: frontend obligation code suggestion and clause selection path

requirements.criterion: 详情面板展示关联条文摘要，并可打开条文详情视图查看 articleNo、sectionPath、clauseText
tests: frontend/e2e/obligation-management.spec.ts :: 管理员可以查看条文详情并管理控制点映射

requirements.criterion: 详情面板展示控制点映射，并支持添加/删除 obligation_control_maps，且删除必须避免跨 obligation 误删
tests: backend/src/modules/knowledge-graph/knowledge-graph.obligations.routes.spec.ts :: should create an obligation control map and write audit log
backend/src/modules/knowledge-graph/knowledge-graph.obligations.routes.spec.ts :: should delete an obligation control map and write audit log
backend/src/modules/knowledge-graph/knowledge-graph.obligations.routes.spec.ts :: should return 403 for control-map mutation endpoints without required role
frontend/lib/api/obligations.test.ts :: creates and deletes obligation control maps
frontend/app/admin/obligations/page.test.tsx :: removes an existing obligation control map
frontend/app/admin/obligations/page.test.tsx :: searches controls and adds an obligation control map
frontend/e2e/obligation-management.spec.ts :: 管理员可以查看条文详情并管理控制点映射

auth_authz_coverage: 403 denied path covered for control-map mutation endpoints

recommendations.action: 在本地或 CI 中提供稳定的 Next runtime 后，重新执行 obligation-management Playwright smoke，补齐浏览器级证据。
